title: oenothera gayophytum f. diffusa
intro: Oenothera gayophytum f. diffusa, also known as diffuse evening primrose, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of diffuse evening primrose include soothing skin irritations, relieving menstrual cramps and other symptoms of PMS, and aiding in the digestion process. Diffuse evening primrose can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its therapeutic benefits.
